authorized_claims: Local meta-audit completeness for the frozen Gate 3 Cluster B evidence stack.
Preservation of theorem identity, semantic-role ownership, typed lineage, dual-backend proof completion, statement parity, and deterministic replay.
Eligibility may be proposed only as a non-operative candidate after all evidence conditions pass.
prohibited_claims: Canonical CLOSE_GATE3 without separate explicit authorization.
Proof-term identity or Lean/Coq kernel equivalence.
Unrestricted semantic equivalence, checker completeness, or global soundness.
Empirical, physical, disappearance, cosmological-vacuum, or absolute-V0 existence claims.
Git tag, GitHub Release, Zenodo deposit, DOI action, or publication authorization.
